calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Wall for the San Francisco SPCA. Edward Watson for Union Bank Of California.

Mr. Watson presented oral argument to support his position stating that the trust specifically designates that the assets go to the survivor's trust and also referred to a settlement agreement. Mr. Wall had no objection to the order and stated that his Client's only concern was that the Decedent died two years ago and that nothing had been done. The Court requested that a clean copy of the order be submitted. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order
